title: September 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 23''' is the 266th day of the year (267th in leap years). There are 99 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Johnny Weissmuller Jr.]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Peter David]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Christopher Miller]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' (1977) 42]] published.
*[[1982]] – [[Gene Day]] dies.
*[[1987]] – [[Joe Kennard]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 3]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 78|''Star Wars Insider'' 78]] released for subscribers.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 104|''Star Wars Insider'' 104]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Prisoners]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – [[Kanan 6|''Kanan'' 6]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Gary Kurtz]] dies.
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 5|''Bounty Hunters'' 5]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[From a Certain Point of View: Return of the Jedi]]'' reprinted in paperback.
